title: Fix deadlock in database connection pool
original_text: Fixed a deadlock in the database connection pool. Connections were being acquired in inconsistent order, causing circular wait conditions. Implemented consistent lock ordering. Added connection timeout mechanism. Implemented deadlock detection and recovery. Added connection pool monitoring. Added tests for deadlock prevention. Result: 28 tests pass, no deadlocks detected.
expected_subject: fix(db): fix deadlock in connection pool with consistent ordering
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(db): fix deadlock in connection pool with consistent ordering"
